name: WA Batch Tagger
description: Expands aliases into tags on WhatsApp Web.
_comment: active tab is saying im only working on the current tab. Scripting is the new way to inject content scripts in MV3. Storage is for saving aliases.
_comment2: js at bottom is basically saying: hey when the extension icon is clicked, open popup.html. content_scripts is saying hey inject content.js into any page that matches web.whatsapp.com/*
